foundation.brand.primary.description: Cor base da marca. Alimenta semantic.color.primary.default.

foundation.color.overlay.blue-600.12.description: Blue-600 at 12% opacity. Toned default in light mode.

foundation.color.overlay.blue-600.20.description: Blue-600 at 20% opacity. Toned hover in light mode.

foundation.color.overlay.blue-600.28.description: Blue-600 at 28% opacity. Toned active in light mode.

foundation.color.overlay.blue-400.15.description: Blue-400 at 15% opacity. Toned default in dark mode.

foundation.color.overlay.blue-400.25.description: Blue-400 at 25% opacity. Toned hover in dark mode.

foundation.color.overlay.blue-400.32.description: Blue-400 at 32% opacity. Toned active in dark mode.

foundation.color.disabled.brand-light.description: Disabled fill for Button Brand in light mode.

foundation.color.disabled.brand-dark.description: Disabled fill for Button Brand in dark mode (pre-blended opaque).

foundation.color.disabled.success-light.description: Disabled fill for Button Success in light mode.

foundation.color.disabled.success-dark.description: Disabled fill for Button Success in dark mode.

foundation.color.disabled.error-light.description: Disabled fill for Button Danger/Error in light mode.

foundation.color.disabled.error-dark.description: Disabled fill for Button Danger/Error in dark mode.

foundation.typography.font.family.displa.description: Same as sans. Separated for future flexibility if display font diverges.

foundation.typography.line.height.contro.description: 16px — matches icon-size sm. Single-line control line-height.
20px — matches icon-size md. Single-line control line-height.
24px — matches icon-size lg. Single-line control line-height.

semantic.background.subtle.description: Subtle alternate background — one step darker than default to create visual separation.

semantic.content.default.description: Conteúdo principal (títulos, body text, ícones primários).

semantic.content.secondary.description: Conteúdo de ênfase reduzida (labels, helper text, ícones secundários).

semantic.content.tertiary.description: Conteúdo de menor ênfase (placeholders, ícones decorativos).

semantic.content.disabled.description: Conteúdo em estado disabled. Isento de contraste WCAG. Unifica text/disabled e state/disabled/foreground (ADR-011).

semantic.brand.default.description: Fill brand principal (Button Brand, indicadores ativos).

semantic.brand.subtle.description: Fill brand de baixa ênfase (seleções, highlights).

semantic.brand.content.default.description: Cor brand usada como conteúdo (texto/ícone brand sobre fundo neutro, label do Toned).

semantic.brand.content.contrast.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill brand sólido (texto do Button Brand). Unifica color/primary/foreground e text/on-brand (ADR-011).

semantic.brand.content.contrast-disabled.description: Conteúdo disabled sobre fill brand disabled.

semantic.accent.content.contrast.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill accent sólido.

semantic.feedback.success.content.defaul.description: Cor success como conteúdo (mensagens, ícones sobre fundo claro).

semantic.feedback.success.content.contra.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill success sólido.
Conteúdo disabled sobre fill success disabled.

semantic.feedback.warning.border.description: Upgraded from amber.500 to amber.600 (ADR-008) for consistency with error.border/info.border at step 600. Passes 3:1 vs amber.50.

semantic.feedback.warning.content.contra.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill warning sólido. Dark text porque amber-500 é claro.

semantic.feedback.error.content.default.description: Cor error como conteúdo (mensagens de erro, ícones de alerta).

semantic.feedback.error.content.contrast.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill error sólido.
Conteúdo disabled sobre fill error disabled.

semantic.feedback.info.content.contrast.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill info sólido. Dark text porque sky-600 é claro demais para branco.

semantic.border.control.default.description: Border color for interactive controls (Input, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio). Meets WCAG 1.4.11 (≥3:1 against control background).

semantic.border.control.hover.description: Border on hover for interactive controls.

semantic.border.control.disabled.description: Border for disabled controls. Exempt from contrast requirements per WCAG 1.4.3.

semantic.border.focus-error.description: Focus ring color for error/danger states

semantic.focus.ring.offset.description: Gap between element and focus ring (2px)

semantic.focus.ring.color.description: Focus ring color, maps to outline-color

semantic.space.inset.2xs.description: 2px. Compact inset for small components like Badge.

semantic.space.gap.2xs.description: 2px. Gap muito compacto — usado em Label Row (label + asterisco required) de form controls. Issue #24.1.

semantic.size.control.sm.description: 32px. Height of sm interactive controls (Button, Input Field, Select Field).

semantic.typography.control.font-size.sm.description: 14px. Font size for sm controls (Button, Input, Select).

semantic.content.disabled.description: Conteúdo em estado disabled. Isento de contraste WCAG. Unifica text/disabled e state/disabled/foreground (ADR-011).

semantic.brand.toned.default.description: Translucent primary bg for toned variants. 15% opacity in dark.

semantic.brand.content.default.description: Cor brand usada como conteúdo sobre fundo neutro/toned em dark mode.

semantic.brand.content.contrast.description: Conteúdo de alto contraste sobre fill brand sólido em dark mode. Dark text porque brand default é blue-400 (claro).

semantic.feedback.success.content.contra.description: Dark text porque success default em dark é green-500 (claro).

semantic.feedback.error.content.contrast.description: Dark text porque error default em dark é red-500 (medium).

semantic.border.control.default.description: Border color for interactive controls. Meets WCAG 1.4.11 (≥3:1 against dark surface).

semantic.border.control.hover.description: Border on hover for interactive controls in dark mode.

semantic.border.control.disabled.description: Border for disabled controls in dark mode. Exempt from contrast requirements per WCAG 1.4.3.

semantic.focus.ring.offset.description: Gap between element and focus ring (2px)

semantic.focus.ring.color.description: Focus ring color, maps to outline-color

semantic.space.inset.2xs.description: 2px. Compact inset for small components like Badge.

semantic.space.gap.2xs.description: 2px. Gap muito compacto — usado em Label Row (label + asterisco required) de form controls. Issue #24.1.

semantic.size.control.sm.description: 32px. Height of sm interactive controls (Button, Input Field, Select Field).

semantic.typography.control.font-size.sm.description: 14px. Font size for sm controls (Button, Input, Select).

component.button.background.toned.disabl.description: Opaque neutral — toned transparency not needed for disabled.

component.button.foreground.toned.defaul.description: Text/icon color on toned background. ADR-011.

component.skeleton.fill.description: Skeleton background fill. Neutral-100 light / neutral-800 dark. Replaces semantic.background.muted per ADR-011.
